chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.٥ N0.0-1331 0f 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For of main case 14.11.2023 Mr Muhammad Yaqoob Soomro advocate for the Petitioner Mr Mehdi Shah, Advocate for Respondent No 4 Mr Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG Learned Counsel for the Respondent No4 submits that each month petitioner would be paid Rs 2OOOOO/ out of his pensionary benefits which the petitioner has already ccepted privately Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition of in the above terms However, default or accordingly disposed to the petitioner would expose violator of said amount non payment to the contempt proceedings hearin8 Learned
